thesis: A PayPal acquisition in 2026 is plausible but still unlikely because reported buyer interest appears preliminary and there is no clear indication PayPal is actively pursuing a sale.
method: Estimated probability from one search-result sample by weighting recency and credibility of top-tier financial outlets and balancing pro-deal interest signals against sale-readiness uncertainty.

evidence.signal: Bloomberg reports Stripe is considering acquiring all or parts of PayPal, citing people familiar with the matter.
Reuters relays Bloomberg that Stripe expressed preliminary interest in acquiring PayPal or assets, suggesting early-stage exploration rather than a formal process.
CNBC reports PayPal shares rose nearly 7% on the acquisition report, indicating market credibility but still rumor-driven dynamics.
